title: Field of Battle
editorialSummary: Famous battles grouped by historical era. False trail: Thermopylae (ancient) and Marathon (ancient) both involve Greeks, and Waterloo (Napoleonic) and Trafalgar (Napoleonic) both involve Napoleon — players may try to group by nation rather than era. The canonical grouping is strictly by era.

meta.gptRationale: The historical-era categories are very distinct and many battle names are iconic, making this relatively approachable despite some history dependence.
